caption: The video begins with a close-up of a person speaking directly to the camera, expressing happiness and gratitude. The background reveals an empty stadium with bright lights illuminating the scene, suggesting a post-match interview or announcement. As the person continues to speak, the camera transitions to a wide shot of the stadium's scoreboard. The scoreboard displays the final score of a football match between Granada CF and Real Madrid, with Real Madrid winning 2-1. The goals are attributed to Machís for Granada at the 49th minute, and F. Mendy and Benzema for Real Madrid at the 9th and 15th minutes, respectively. The time on the scoreboard reads 89:57, indicating the match has concluded. The atmosphere is celebratory, reflecting the joy of the winning team.
